utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know you , really did not have to take me to the airport .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Besides , somebody had to ride in that other taxi with the rest of your luggage , and your friends do not really seem to care too much that you are leaving .

emotion_cause.span: 5_your friends do not really seem to care too much that you are leaving .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , we are not really that close . Okay , so I guess this is uh , good ... bye then .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: On no ! No ! It is not good ... bye , I am not leaving until you get on that plane .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I guess this is uh , good ... bye then .
